verdict: A perfectly timed but incredibly monotonous chart that relies on an exhausting 30-second loop of the exact same four-note pattern.

issues.problem: Extreme repetition. The chart repeats the exact same sequence (U -> D -> L -> JUMP LR) dozens of times in a row without any variation, which becomes incredibly boring and physically fatiguing on the left foot.
Awkward transition. The JUMP DR is immediately followed by a tap L at 25.749, forcing a sudden and uncomfortable weight shift.
Uninspired step sequence. This section repeats a simple 'R, U, D, L' circle drill over and over, ignoring the syncopation and nuance of the synth melody.
